017package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
020
021/**
022 * Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-resolution operations the bean-property
023 * validation pass needs from the marshalling layer.
024 *
025 * <p>
026 * Implemented by the marshalling-side {@code MarshallingContext} so that
027 * {@code BeanPropertyMeta.Builder#validate} can stay free of direct
028 * {@code MarshallingContext} references and live in {@code org.apache.juneau.commons.bean}.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * The {@code Object}-typed counterpart on the {@code Builder} is what gets stored long-term;
032 * {@code validate(...)} narrows it to {@link BeanTypeResolver} just for the duration of the
033 * resolve+validate pass.
034 *
035 * @see BeanInfo
036 */
037public interface BeanTypeResolver {
038
039   /**
040    * Resolves the bean-property type-info for a property given its (optional)
041    * {@link BeanProp @BeanProp} annotation and Java type.
042    *
043    * @param lastBeanProp The last {@link BeanProp @BeanProp} annotation found on the property's
044    * field/getter/setter, or {@code null} if none.
045    * @param type The Java type of the property as derived from the field/getter/setter signature.
046    * @param typeVarImpls Resolved type-variable substitutions for the enclosing class.
047    * @return The resolved type-info, or {@code null} if no resolution was possible.
048    */
049   @SuppressWarnings({
050      "java:S1452" // BeanInfo<?> wildcard return intentional; the concrete bean type is not statically known at this API level
051   })
052   BeanInfo<?> resolveType(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> lastBeanProp, ClassInfo type, TypeVariables typeVarImpls);
053
054   /**
055    * Returns the type-info for {@code Object.class} (used as the fallback element/value type for
056    * raw/unparameterized collections and maps).
057    *
058    * @return Non-{@code null} type-info for {@code Object.class}.
059    */
060   @SuppressWarnings({
061      "java:S1452" // BeanInfo<?> wildcard return intentional; used as a polymorphic fallback type for unparameterized collections
062   })
063   BeanInfo<?> objectType();
064
065   /**
066    * Returns the annotation provider used to read annotations during property validation.
067    *
068    * @return Non-{@code null} annotation provider.
069    */
070   AnnotationProvider getAnnotationProvider();
071}
